llm_advice.rationale: Fusing the rank-16 path (B.T @ X and A @ intermediate) and the addition into a single custom kernel reduces kernel launch overhead and intermediate memory writes, while keeping cuBLAS for the large W @ X GEMM ensures no regression on the dominant computation.

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
